_comment: Phase 8 coverage uplift gates landed 2026-05-02. BE thresholds 90/78/85/90 enforced via pre-commit smart-skip + ci-cd-backend.yml. FE thresholds 82/68/71/83 (Phase 9 lifts toward 85/70/74/85). Test counts include Phase 8 Group B BE additions (+50 tests across 5 files: env-production-validation-distinctness, cookie-parser-middleware, audio-storage-stub, audio-storage-s3-pure, nonce-store) and Group C FE flake fix (AiConsentModal). Jest config bug fix: coveragePathIgnorePatterns now per-project (was ignored at top level in projects-mode).
